summary: Fixed tray icon showing 'Electron' by setting initial tooltip, and rewrote taskbar overlay to show colored circle with white percentage text using proper 3-bit bitmap font encoding.
fixes_applied: Added initial tray tooltip to prevent 'Electron' from showing
Rewrote overlay rendering with colored circle background
Added white text overlay for percentage display
Fixed 3-bit bitmap font patterns for proper rendering
Improved bit checking logic (1 << (2 - col) for 3-bit patterns)
next_steps: Run npm run start to test the fixes
Verify tray tooltip shows 'Usage Tracker' not 'Electron'
Verify taskbar overlay shows percentage number
